email_subject: Sollicitatie — Store Assistant / Sales Associate – Christmas Shop
email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Store Assistant / Sales Associate in de kerstwinkel in Brugge. Ik ben een klantgerichte junior digital marketer met ervaring in retail en logistiek, en ik spreek Engels (vloeiend), Turks (moedertaal) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding).

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto help ik klanten met on-page SEO en content, maar ik heb ook gewerkt in een magazijnomgeving bij Katoen Natie, waar ik nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie combineerde. Daarnaast heb ik als front-end developer bij ViviDoctor gewerkt. Ik ben gewend om in een internationaal team te werken en vind het leuk om klanten te helpen met een glimlach.

Ik ben flexibel inzetbaar, ook in het weekend, en kan snel starten. Ik kijk ernaar uit om de kerstsfeer in Brugge te helpen verspreiden!

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Store Assistant / Sales Associate position at the Christmas store in Bruges. I am a customer-oriented junior digital marketer with experience in retail and logistics, and I speak English (fluent), Turkish (native), and Dutch (B1, currently taking classes).

In my current role at Episto, I help clients with on-page SEO and content, but I have also worked in a warehouse environment at Katoen Natie, where I combined accuracy and efficiency. Additionally, I worked as a front-end developer at ViviDoctor. I am used to working in an international team and enjoy helping customers with a smile.

I am flexible, also available on weekends, and can start soon. I look forward to helping spread the Christmas spirit in Bruges!

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Store Assistant / Sales Associate in de kerstwinkel in Brugge. De combinatie van klantcontact, een feestelijke sfeer en een internationaal team spreekt mij enorm aan.

Hoewel mijn achtergrond in digital marketing ligt, heb ik ook ervaring in retail en logistiek. Bij Katoen Natie werkte ik in een magazijnomgeving waar nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie belangrijk waren. Daarnaast heb ik als front-end developer bij ViviDoctor gewerkt, waar ik leerde om gestructureerd en klantgericht te werken. In mijn huidige rol bij Episto help ik klanten met SEO en content, maar ik verlang naar een functie met meer direct klantcontact.

Ik spreek Engels vloeiend, Turks als moedertaal en Nederlands op B1-niveau (ik volg momenteel lessen om mijn Nederlands te verbeteren). Ik werk graag in een internationale omgeving en vind het leuk om toeristen en bezoekers uit verschillende landen te helpen. Ik ben flexibel inzetbaar, ook in het weekend, en kan snel starten.

De kerstperiode is voor mij een bijzondere tijd, en ik zou graag bijdragen aan een warme en magische winkelervaring voor klanten. Ik ben enthousiast, betrouwbaar en werk graag in teamverband.

Ik hoop u binnenkort te ontmoeten om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Store Assistant / Sales Associate position at the Christmas store in Bruges. The combination of customer contact, a festive atmosphere, and an international team appeals to me greatly.

Although my background is in digital marketing, I also have experience in retail and logistics. At Katoen Natie, I worked in a warehouse environment where accuracy and efficiency were important. Additionally, I worked as a front-end developer at ViviDoctor, where I learned to work in a structured and customer-oriented way. In my current role at Episto, I help clients with SEO and content, but I am looking for a role with more direct customer interaction.

I speak English fluently, Turkish as my native language, and Dutch at B1 level (I am currently taking classes to improve my Dutch). I enjoy working in an international environment and like helping tourists and visitors from different countries. I am flexible, also available on weekends, and can start soon.

The Christmas season is a special time for me, and I would love to contribute to a warm and magical shopping experience for customers. I am enthusiastic, reliable, and enjoy working as part of a team.

I hope to meet you soon to further discuss my motivation.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Customer-oriented with experience in retail and logistics (Katoen Natie)
Fluent in English and Turkish, Dutch B1 (currently improving)
Comfortable working in international environments with diverse customers
Flexible schedule, including weekends
Enthusiastic, reliable team player with strong communication skills
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: welcoming and assisting customers, advising on products, processing payments
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Retail & logistics: accuracy, efficiency, restocking, maintaining store presentation
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
